title: The Missing Art of Van Gogh

segments.text: In 2008, two Van Gogh paintings worth $100 million were stolen.
The theft occurred from a museum in Italy during the night.
Thieves broke in through a window and grabbed the paintings.
Despite extensive investigations, the paintings remain missing.
The case remains one of the art world's greatest mysteries.
Art enthusiasts still hope for their return.

visual.prompt: people viewing art at a gallery

segments.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: In 2008, two priceless Van Gogh paintings were stolen from an Italian museum and never recovered. Follow for daily cold cases! 🎨
